content: react-resizable-panels v4 (4.12.x): NEW v4 API uses Group/Panel/Separator (older PanelGroup/Panel/PanelResizeHandle API is pre-v4 — training-data examples are stale). Collapsible via collapsible prop (collapses below minSize); Separator carries WAI-ARIA props for keyboard a11y; layout persistence via defaultLayout + onLayoutChanged/groupRef getLayout/setLayout; sizes in %, px, em, rem, vh, vw. Repo bvaughn/react-resizable-panels, 35M weekly downloads.
